flag_statement: At the quotient summit, the six-nine target has no missing pair identity. The only remaining pair-set mismatch is a union-side null component. This null is not treated as garbage in this record. It is marked as a well/socket candidate: the unpaired place against which the six-nine pair identity closes.
next_ascent_target: return home by auditing the marked holds in reverse order without moving the summit flag
return_home_statement: The summit flag is planted. The descent path is now legible: 058 gives the corrected target candidate; 060 reduces artifact-path disagreement to content mismatch; 061 isolates surface identity; 062 reduces the quotient miss to one signature; 063 shows the promoted row is not the obstruction; 064 shows the two orphan rows have only artifact-level hints; 065 shows orphan admit/exclude does not close the issue; 066 identifies the remaining obstruction as a union-side null component. The return home begins from the summit with all holds marked.
